record.field: 🇮🇹 Great meeting you at the Summer Fancy Food Show — {{ (object.name or '').split(' ')[0] or 'there' }}

div.style: font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; max-width: 620px; margin: 0 auto; color: #5f3511; line-height: 1.6;

div.p: It was a real pleasure meeting you at the Summer Fancy Food Show in New York. The energy at the Italian Pavilion this year was fantastic, and I'm glad we connected at our booth.

As promised, here's a closer look at our family-run production based in Calabria, Southern Italy. CasaFolino has been crafting premium Italian artisan food since 1962 — exactly the kind of authentic, specialty-grade story the Fancy Food crowd looks for.

✓ Strongly export-oriented (90%+ of our volume, 20+ countries)
✓ Certified BRC, IFS, Kosher, Halal and EU Organic
✓ A reliable partner for premium retail, specialty stores, Ho.Re.Ca. and private label

div.style: background: #f7f0e2; border-left: 4px solid #d7a028; padding: 16px 20px; margin: 22px 0; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
div.p: Beyond our branded range, a large part of what we do is building products for our partners. If you're looking to develop or expand your own private label line, we offer:

tr.td: 🔬 Custom recipe development for your market and price point
📐 Flexible formats, packaging and labeling (your brand, your specs)
🏭 Full certification coverage already in place
📦 Sustainable MOQs — growing brands and established chains alike

a.style: color:#6c3a00; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; text-decoration:none;

td.a: 📕 Product Catalogue 2026 — Spreads, Condiments & First Courses

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:11px; color:#7d6142; margin-top:2px;

span.style: color:#6c3a00; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:bold;

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:11px; color:#7d6142; margin-top:2px;

td.div: Attached · PDF — who we are, production capacity, certifications

span.style: color:#6c3a00; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:bold;

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:11px; color:#7d6142; margin-top:2px;

td.div: Attached · PDF — our range at a glance

div.p: The natural next step would be to send you samples of the references that best fit your assortment — branded or private label. Just tell me which categories matter most for your market and I'll arrange shipping this week.
Looking forward to turning a great show conversation into something concrete.

table.style: font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; color: #5f3511; width: 620px; max-width: 620px; background: #ffffff;

div.style: font-size: 10px; line-height: 14px; color: #f86295; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 20px; line-height: 25px; font-weight: 700; color: #5f3511;

td.style: vertical-align: middle; font-size: 11px; line-height: 15px; color: #6f7b3f; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
padding: 9px 16px 0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 16px; color: #7d6142;
